note: Treasure kit (synced from synergy entry 198 via the treasure remap). S1 (parser-kept): FB team buffs incl. Max Ammo -50.66% which accelerates everyone's last-bullet procs. S2 override: 256.17% + Damage Taken 10.01% on every own last bullet (parser-faithful, kept); the 1687% nuke only hits targets in Designated Target status (applied by her burst for 10s, every other rotation) -> modeled as a burst-cast dot ticking every ~3s x3 (her last-bullet cadence during FB with halved mag: ~30 rounds / 12 rps + ~1s reload). Burst (parser-kept + stat fix): Superior Elemental Code Attack Damage 130% = elemAdvantageDamagePct (damage-up only with elemental advantage), 1407.64% nuke; the 3s boss stun and ATK-down are irrelevant in v1 (boss never acts). RANGE: both riders keep noRange (skill/rider damage NEVER takes the +30% range major — universal rule, not a calibration). FULL BURST: both riders TAKE the +50% FB major by landing time; neither carries noFb. Note the historical calibration that used to suppress FB on both (fitting real T4 runs 1.29->0.97) is GONE — it was a fit knob, and it is measurement-refuted for both riders (2026-07-23 frame read). noFb AUDIT (2026-07-15, autonomous-invariant-audit): SPLIT applied. The 256.17% last-bullet rider is a normal-attack rider landing during FB -> noFb REMOVED (FB applies by timing, DECISIONS-mandated). The 1687% (2026-07-15, priv focus video re-read): kit text = a last-bullet rider gated on 'Designated Target status' (NOT a front-cast; the front nuke is the parser's separate 1407.64% Burst Skill). MEASURED 2026-07-23 (u7 focus video @ 15.503s, owner-sourced; full record in docs/probe-runs.md): the 1687 rider FIRES in the u7 comp. One popup stack carries 571,999 (red CORE HIT), 367,714 (white normal), 37,871,391 and 5,750,750; the 37,871,391 IS this rider — 37,871,391 / 5,750,750 × 256.17 = 1687.00, the datamined coefficient exactly. It was previously searched for and not found because it is occluded in the frame, so the earlier 'absent in u7 -> comp/condition-dependent' reading had no mechanism behind it. Consequences for THIS block, both making it DOCUMENTED-WRONG: (a) it is NOT a DoT — it lands in the SAME frame as the last-bullet 256.17 rider and shares its exact buff snapshot, which is the kit's lastBullet trigger, not an intervalSec 3 tick; (b) `noFb: true` is REFUTED — the 256.17 rider's 5,750,750 is 1.5015× its non-FB 3.83M so the frame is inside a Full Burst, and the 1687 popup is 6.58547× it against a kit ratio of 1687/256.17 = 6.58547, i.e. it took every major the 256.17 took. EVIDENCE TIER for the two REFUTED verdicts above: MEASURED, n=1 frame — which alone would be hypothesis-strength — but carrying an INDEPENDENT-METHOD confirmation, since the coefficient back-derivation (37,871,391/5,750,750×256.17 = 1687.00 to 2dp, and the 6.58547 ratio to 5dp) is a different method from the visual digit read and could not agree by chance; the occluded digit was additionally re-read by the owner on a cleaner frame. ENACTED 2026-07-23 (owner ruling, faithful > fit): the block is now a lastBullet-triggered flatDamage 1687 (noRange) gated on requiresTargetStatus 'Designated Target', with her burst applying targetStatus {name:'Designated Target', durationSec:10} on the same kit line as the ATK ▼5.02% debuff. No noFb, no hardcoded hit count — the count is whatever her cadence produces. Proc rate sanity-checked, NOT fitted: the rider lands on ~47% of her last bullets, against ~44% expected from the window arithmetic (10s status × 5 bursts ≈ 28% of the fight, at roughly double last-bullet density because her own S1 halves the magazine during Full Burst via maxAmmoPct −50.66). DELIBERATE BOARD COST, faithful > fit (grave-pierce precedent, DECISIONS 2026-07-17): she moves 0.937 COLD → 1.118 HOT (0.83→0.96, 0.97→1.18, 1.01→1.22). That overshoot is FIT-EXPOSURE, not a defect of this encoding — the noFb flags this change removes were themselves the calibration knob that had pulled her 1.29→0.97, so what is now visible is the pre-existing over-model they were hiding. Do NOT re-fudge the 1687/256.17/1407.64 coefficients (all datamined) or re-add noFb to close it; the residual is a per-unit localization thread. CONFIRMED half (unchanged): the 256% rider gets FB (video 5,750,750 = 367,714 × ~15.64 FB-inclusive; non-FB 3.83M) -> its noFb removal is right.
